headline: Claude and generative AI tooling lead the window while a cluster of distributed-training techniques breaks out as new entrants.
body: Claude-centered tooling dominates the rotation, with Anthropic's Claude Design automating branded landing pages and design assets from a design system, and PAI building persistent memory and structured workflows on top of Claude Code. On the technique side, attribution, collision detection, and filter propagation are all flagged as breakouts, while percolation, auto-scaling, DeepSpeed Ulysses, Untied Ulysses, and CPU offloading enter as new entrants. Separately, Gemma 4's 31B model placed fourth on the LM Arena open model leaderboard at 2 to 20 times smaller than comparable models and runs on a single GPU. Lawyers were sanctioned for submitting AI-generated citations to nonexistent case law, underscoring hallucination risk in professional filings.

How to Use Claude Design – Full AI Design Workflow 2026
